[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/adriantoine/enzyme-to-json/compare/v3.3.3...v3.3.4)

-   Improved TypeScript type definitions by adding `Cheerio` wrappers as a possible type to `toJson` ([#​105](https://togithub.com/adriantoine/enzyme-to-json/issues/105))
